insight: Issue #1544 added a 6th spawn rule type KILL_COUNT ("After A Kill Goal", PR pending review): it counts player kills of selected Boss-plugin mobs into a shared counter (Kill_Goal/Kill_Count in spawnrules/<name>.yml) and spawns the rule's Bosses at its Boss Locations when the goal is reached, then resets. The counter is global, not per player; actionbar progress uses Progress_Format with {boss}, {count}, {goal}, {remaining} variables.
